description: Color event photograph. Taken inside a dim auditorium or theater with rows of red upholstered seats and warm wall sconce lighting, it shows a group of new citizens and guests standing among the seats, many with right hands raised and several waving small handheld American flags, during a naturalization oath. Attendees wear winter coats and COVID-era face masks; a few are in U.S. military dress uniforms (a Marine in dress blues visible at right). It is an ambient-light color photograph with no overlaid text, slogans, or graphic design and no visible watermark. Per the tweet, this is the Presidents Day naturalization ceremony at George Washington's Mount Vernon for 30 new citizens.
